---
title: "Speakers"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero}
## Speakers
:::


::: {.organizer-grid}

::: {.organizer-card}
[**Benedikt Brantner**](https://www.ipp.mpg.de/4106005/gspm){target="_blank"}<br>
Max Planck Institute for Plasma Physics<br>
:::


::: {.organizer-card}
[**Georg Bökman**](https://georg-bn.github.io/){target="_blank"}<br>
University of Amsterdam<br>
:::

::: {.organizer-card}
[**Jacob Skarby**](https://www.jacobskarby.com/){target="_blank"}<br>
Technical University of Munich<br>
:::

::: {.organizer-card}
[**Moritz Stargalla**](https://www.utn.de/person/moritz-stargalla/){target="_blank"}<br>
University of Technology Nuremberg<br>
:::

::: {.organizer-card}
[**Pascal Esser**](https://www.ed.math.lmu.de/m/math4ai/en/members/contact-page/pascal-esser-032dce3b.html){target="_blank"}<br>
LMU Munich<br>
:::

::: {.organizer-card}
[**Simon Weinzierl**](https://www.mathematik.uni-muenchen.de/~weinzier/){target="_blank"}<br>
LMU Munich<br>
:::

::: {.organizer-card}
[**Thomas Dages**](https://cvg.cit.tum.de/members/dagt){target="_blank"}<br>
Technical University of Munich<br>
:::




:::
